# Madar OS

Madar OS is an Arabic SaaS platform for operating car wash businesses in Saudi Arabia.

## Product

Madar OS helps car washes run daily operations from one dashboard:

- Car queue operations: received, in service, ready, delivered.
- Self check-in QR for end customers.
- Live status page and TV/display screen.
- Customer records, loyalty, and visits.
- Finance, VAT, daily closing, and reports.
- Worker tracking and operational insights.
- Madar AI assistant for client support and operational guidance.

## Commercial Position

Madar OS can be sold and used before WhatsApp Business API approval. The platform already supports internal operations, QR registration, customers, finance, reports, and AI assistance. Official WhatsApp automation should be activated only after Meta approval and a connected WhatsApp Business number.

## Packages

- Starter: basic car wash operations.
- Pro: QR self check-in, live display, reports, VAT, and Madar AI.
- Premium: advanced support, deeper reports, and custom operational setup.

## Important Notes

- Payments, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and digital wallet features are optional paid add-ons.
- WhatsApp Business API depends on Meta verification.
- The website is Arabic-first and focused on Saudi car wash operators.
